# c1

## Why

We need the alpha capability so the validation fixture exercises a complete, valid change end to end.

## What Changes

- Introduce the alpha capability described in features/alpha/example.feature.

## Design

Implement the alpha behavior in a single module; no new dependencies required.

## Tasks

- [ ] 1.1 Implement the alpha behavior
- [ ] 1.2 Verify the alpha scenario passes
